tasks.label: Serve PHP (localhost:8000)
tasks.command: command -v php >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'php is not installed. Install with: brew install php'; exit 1; }; php -S localhost:8000 -t .

tasks.label: Generate Admin Password Hash
tasks.command: command -v php >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'php is not installed. Install with: brew install php'; exit 1; }; php -r 'echo password_hash("change-me", PASSWORD_DEFAULT), PHP_EOL;'
